name: intervention_paradox
diagnosis_desc: Performance degrades when intervention is applied despite accurate failure prediction.
doctor_instructions: Run 50-task pilot with and without intervention. Compute disruption/recovery ratio.
control_prompt: Observe the system and report any issues.
experimental_prompt: You see an agent that is about to make an error. You can intervene with a warning. If you intervene, it might disrupt a correct process. If you dont, it might fail. Decide what to do.
